brandcolor-white.usage: Raised surfaces, assistant bubbles, inputs, text on primary buttons.

brandcolor-primary.usage: Primary CTA, links, active nav, sliders, error emphasis (text).
examples: bg-brandcolor-primary text-brandcolor-white hover:bg-brandcolor-primary-hover rounded-full px-5 py-2

brandcolor-text-strong.usage: Primary text, headings, scrim overlays with opacity.

brandcolor-stroke-strong.usage: Strong borders and default icon color on fill chrome.

brandcolor-strokeweak.usage: Default borders and input hover border.

primary.completeClasses: rounded-full bg-brandcolor-primary px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-brandcolor-white hover:bg-brandcolor-primary-hover disabled:opacity-50
primary.whenToUse: Main submit actions (Send when enabled, Save check-in, Try again).

outlineOnFill.completeClasses: rounded-full border border-brandcolor-strokeweak px-3 py-1.5 text-sm text-brandcolor-text-strong hover:bg-brandcolor-white

card.whenToUse: History rows, report filters, meal cards.

input.classes: rounded-xl border border-brandcolor-strokeweak bg-brandcolor-fill px-3 py-2 text-sm text-brandcolor-text-strong

mealComposer.sendWhenEmpty: disabled:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none on Send when message is whitespace-only

workflow: STEP 1: Read src/app/globals.css for the eight brandcolor tokens only.
STEP 2: Read themeguide.json themeColors and componentGuidelines.
STEP 3: Implement UI using only bg-brandcolor-*, text-brandcolor-*, border-brandcolor-*, font-serif, font-sans.
STEP 4: Verify no hex in JSX class strings, no gray/zinc/teal palette utilities.

noHexInComponents.rule: Do not paste hex colors into JSX class strings; use theme tokens.

noCoolDefaultPalette.rule: Do not use bg-gray-*, text-zinc-*, bg-teal-*, etc.

noTailwindConfigJs.rule: Theme extension is only in globals.css for this repo.
